geofencing.toastDesc: You have entered the zone of interest!

detail.distanceTo: You are {distance} away from this point.
detail.unlockInstruction: Get closer than {meters}m to unlock its secrets.
detail.gpsInstruction: Activate GPS and get closer to discover the hidden secrets.
detail.noAudio: Notice: This point has no audio file assigned in the DB
detail.videoLocked: The video will be revealed when you arrive at the location.
detail.finalChallengeInstruction: Visit all points of the route to activate the final quiz
detail.linkCopied: Link copied to clipboard for sharing!

legends.createAdmin: Create them from the admin panel.

no-connection.title: No connection
no-connection.message: You cannot access the legends without an internet connection. Check your network and try again.

gps-denied.title: Location required
gps-denied.message: To discover the nearest legends, we need access to your location. Activate GPS and grant permissions to the app.

general.title: Something went wrong
general.message: An unexpected error occurred. If the problem persists, please contact us.

error.footer: Legends of the Pyrenees · Heritage and Territory

parking.title: PARK AND WALK
parking.desc: The streets are narrow, made for people. Please leave the car in the parking lot and enjoy on foot.

silence.title: SILENCE IS HERITAGE
silence.desc: Enjoy the calm. No speakers or shouting. Respect the animals, they are at home.

offline.title: ANTICIPATE COVERAGE
offline.desc: Download the indicated contents before leaving. This way you'll have maps and audio when 5G fails.

timeslider.title: TIME SLIDER
timeslider.desc: Move your finger to see the past (or the soul) of the landscape.

legacy.title: YOUR LEGACY
legacy.desc: Complete the route to seal your Passport. We don't collect data, we collect moments.

gps.title: PRECISION GPS
gps.desc: Activate location to find the secrets. Tip: Bluetooth helps fine-tune the position.

meta.title: Geocontent - Discover the Heritage
meta.description: An immersive experience to discover the legends and heritage of the territory.
